---
title: "Treelogy: A Benchmark Suite for Tree Traversals"
date: 2017-10-12
year: 2017
pdf: "https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/stamp/stamp.jsp?tp=&arnumber=7975294"
venue: "ISPASS 2017"
award: ""
code: "https://bitbucket.org/plcl/treelogy"
slides: "files/slides/ispass2017.pdf"
preprint: ""
video: ""
author:
  - name: Nikhil Hegde
  - name: Jianqiao Liu
  - name: Kirshanthan Sundararajah
  - name: Milind Kulkarni
categories:
  - Conference
description: ""
---
